'''Demos Traxen''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] sent to [[Kallistas]] to capture [[Pallas Quintell]], shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. He booked passage on the ''[[Red Fang]]'' with [[Tarquin Zian]]. Upon his arrival, Traxen learned that Quintell had already been captured by rival hunters. He blamed his failure to secure the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] on the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]], who spent much of the trip trying to avoid Imperial entanglements. Later, Traxen was hired by prefect [[Dengless Rinn]] of Kallistas to track pirate [[Jondrell Inx]], alongside fellow bounty hunters [[Sirenas Firil]] and [[Chandrex Grenn]].
